# MuleSoft Design Center

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of Design Center documentation.
> See [Design Center llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/llms-full.txt) for all the Design Center documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Add Behavioral Headers to Simulated API Calls](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/apid-behavioral-headers.md)
- [API Designer Troubleshooting](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/apid-general-troubleshooting.md)
- [Adding Dependencies to an API-Specification Project](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-add-api-dependency.md)
- [Set User Access Permissions](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-assigning-permissions.md)
- [AsyncAPI Specifications](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-async-api.md)
- [Best Practices when using API Designer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-best-practices.md)

- [Design Center Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-center-release-notes.md)
- [Root Files in Projects in the Text Editor in API Designer](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-change-root-file.md)

- [Create an API Specification with the Visual API Editor](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-create-publish-api-visual-editor.md)
- [Delete a Project](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-delete-project.md)
- [Designing API Specs and Fragments](https://docs.mulesoft.com/design-center/design-designing-api-specs-fragments.md)
